# FIXTURE: LEGO order confirmation (real email, captured 2026-07-05)
# sender: Noreply@t.crm.lego.com
# subject: We've got it! Your LEGO(R) order is confirmed, Joshua
# gmail_message_id: 19efd09d7c5056ff  date: 2026-06-25T04:28:58Z
# note: click-tracking URLs stripped

LEGO

View online |
My Account


We've got your order

Hi Joshua,

Thanks for your order. The countdown to building has officially begun!

We want to be sure your experience is as awesome as it can be, so here's an easy way for you to keep track of your order. Checking the status of your order is really simple and you can do it at any time. Click on your name in the top right corner of
https://www.lego.com
LEGO.com to view your LEGO account and you'll find your orders listed there. If you don't have an account, you can still check your order's status. Visit our Order Status page
https://www.lego.com/page/static/orders
here to get the info you need.

The next update you should get from us will be another email letting you know your shipment is on its way!

Please be aware that if you have ordered more than one item, your order may arrive in separate shipments and not all together.

Happy building!
LEGO Customer Service

ORDER STATUS
STORE FINDER





 *Please note that no binding agreement is in effect until you receive a shipping confirmation email, which will be sent once your order has been processed and dispatched.

 If your order was paid using a credit card, debit card, Apple Pay, or gift card, we will be authorising it shortly, but no charge will be made until your order is shipped. If you used PayPal, you’ll be charged once your item(s) are available in our warehouse. If we are unable to obtain authorisation, we will contact you. Please note that your bank may hold these funds temporarily as part of the authorisation process. Stock levels may differ between the time you submit your order and the time it is processed. If any of your items are on backorder, you will be notified in a separate email.

 *All orders are subject to review which may affect shipping times.

 This email was sent to:
mailto:joshua.buckingham@gmail.com
joshua.buckingham@gmail.com

 We are always happy to hear what you think about our products and services. If you would like to ask a question or make a comment, please go to
https://www.lego.com/service
LEGO.com/service and fill in the email form that best describes your query.
